tattoo.title: Tattoo Studio System v4
tattoo.description: Comprehensive management platform for tattoo studios: client management (JotForm sync), session scheduling with Google Calendar, inventory control, and automated monthly financial statements. Built with Flask, SQLAlchemy, PostgreSQL and Docker; includes Google OAuth and background jobs for automation.

scambo.title: Scambo Test Flet v1
scambo.description: A social platform for secure bartering and trading goods/services without money. Built with Flet (Python) featuring Material Design UI, mock data layer, and clean architecture.

easypassword.title: EasyPassword
easypassword.description: Simple password wallet and generator for creating strong and secure passwords quickly.

about.title: About
about.summary: Backend Developer focused on production-ready systems using Python and modern APIs. I design and build resilient, secure, and scalable backend services with FastAPI/Flask, SQLAlchemy/Alembic, PostgreSQL, Docker, and CI/CD. My current work emphasizes authentication and authorization (OAuth2, JWT, RBAC, WebAuthn/passkeys), automated testing with Pytest, and secure application design. I use AI tools strategically (MCP and local agents) to accelerate debugging, prototyping, and documentation, always with direct human validation for architecture and technical decisions.
about.background: Independent Software Developer (May 2025 - Present): building backend systems for real clients and internal products with production-oriented architecture, security, and delivery workflows. Tattoo Artist & Creative Entrepreneur (Jan 2011 - Jul 2025): managed high-volume client projects end-to-end, strengthening ownership, communication, and problem-solving under pressure. Customer Service Representative at MAPFRE (Oct 2016 - Jan 2018): handled high-volume bilingual support in Portuguese and Spanish, developing practical user-experience and system-usability insight.
skills: Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, deployment workflows
Security practices, API integrations, webhooks, backend service design
about.philosophy: Practical, learning‑by‑doing approach; pragmatic engineering with iterative improvement; leverage AI tools to accelerate learning and improve code quality.
about.personal: Former freelance tattoo artist (14+ years), bringing autonomy, adaptability, client‑focused communication, and strong problem‑solving skills to software development.
about.backend_group_1: Python, FastAPI, Flask, SQLAlchemy, Alembic, PostgreSQL
about.backend_group_2: Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Linux, deployment workflows
about.frontend_group_2: Responsive UI, accessibility, clean integration with backend APIs

contact.title: Contact
contact.resumo_text: Open to remote and hybrid Backend Developer roles, plus selected freelance backend projects. If you need support with Python APIs, authentication, data modeling, CI/CD, or backend architecture, contact me via email or LinkedIn.
contact.availability: Currently open for freelance projects and full-time opportunities.
